headline: A Look At Lockheed Martin (LMT) Valuation After Q1 Earnings Miss And Production Delays
summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) stock is in focus after first quarter revenue and profit came in below analyst expectations, tied to F-16 and C-130 production delays, even as management reaffirmed full year guidance. See our latest analysis for Lockheed Martin. The share price reaction has been sharp, with a 30 day share price return of 17% and a 90 day share price return of 19.1%, even though the 1 year total shareholder return is 11.4% and the 5 year total shareholder return is 50.4%. This points to...
